'''gatapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabook|kabook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabook|kabook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gatapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gætæpæth|gætæpæth]] || [[word:gætæpæj|gætæpæj]] || [[word:gætæpæsh|gætæpæsh]] || [[word:gætæpæ|gætæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatatapath|gatatapath]] || [[word:gatatapaj|gatatapaj]] || [[word:gatatapash|gatatapash]] || [[word:gatatapa|gatatapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatapath|gatapath]] || [[word:gatapaj|gatapaj]] || [[word:gatapash|gatapash]] || [[word:gatapa|gatapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatafpath|gatafpath]] || [[word:gatafpaj|gatafpaj]] || [[word:gatafpash|gatafpash]] || [[word:gatafpaf|gatafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gatapatha|gatapatha]] || [[word:gatapaja|gatapaja]] || [[word:gatapasha|gatapasha]] || [[word:gatapaka|gatapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatapath|gatapath]] || [[word:gatapaj|gatapaj]] || [[word:gatapash|gatapash]] || [[word:gatapa|gatapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatapathal|gatapathal]] || [[word:gatapajal|gatapajal]] || [[word:gatapashal|gatapashal]] || [[word:gatapakal|gatapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatapathatha|gatapathatha]] || [[word:gatapajaja|gatapajaja]] || [[word:gatapashasha|gatapashasha]] || [[word:gatapaka|gatapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatapathan|gatapathan]] || [[word:gatapajan|gatapajan]] || [[word:gatapashan|gatapashan]] || [[word:gatapakan|gatapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatapathaoro|gatapathaoro]] || [[word:gatapajaoro|gatapajaoro]] || [[word:gatapashaoro|gatapashaoro]] || [[word:gatapakaoro|gatapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
